GameOver.description: True only if the game has already ended, not if it is merely entering a finale, epilogue, or wrap-up.

Reason.description: A short explanation in the target language.

EndingId.description: Use short snake_case when GameOver is true. Use an empty string when GameOver is false.

EndingType.description: Use an empty string when GameOver is false.

EndingTitle.description: A concise UI-facing ending title in the target language. Use an empty string when GameOver is false.

EndingSummary.description: A concise UI-facing ending summary in the target language. Use an empty string when GameOver is false.
